name: Hearty Noodle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the noodles according to package directions. Drain and rinse with hot water.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef and onions; drain excess fat.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the soups, cheese, milk, salt, and pepper.
5. Add the cooked ground beef and noodles to the bowl; stir gently until combined.
6. Pour the mixture into two ungreased 2-quart casserole dishes.
7. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 to 35 minutes, or until thoroughly heated.
8. Remove the foil and sprinkle with cooked Chow mein noodles and cashew pieces.
9. Bake an additional 10 minutes.
10. Each casserole makes 6 servings (1 1/3 cups each). To freeze, place in freezer after mixing but before baking. To prepare frozen casserole, thaw completely; increase baking time to 45 to 55 minutes. Colby cheese may be substituted for cheddar cheese. Peanuts may be used instead of cashews.
